title: RTS heightmap → Warlords 3D terrain
summary: Upsample RTS-Grudge 200m/128² heightmap export into the center of the 1024m Warlords 3D home island mesh.
dataFlow: Railway stores rtsHeightmap in home_islands.state JSONB
generateIslandTerrainFromRts() upsamples center; outer ring blends procedural shoreline

scale.placement: RTS island centered at world origin

verify: Export island from RTS-Grudge while signed in
Open /home-island — console shows [Island3D] Terrain from RTS heightmap export
Terrain center matches RTS island shape
